  fdo:
    manufacturing_server_url: ""
  redhat:
    connector:
      enabled: false
    insights:
      enabled: false
    subscription_manager: {}
storage:
  partitions:
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /data
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    label: home
    minsize: 2 GiB
    mountpoint: /home
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 500 MiB
    mountpoint: /home/shadowman
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /foo
    type: plain
  - fs_type: xfs
    minsize: 4 GiB
    mountpoint: /var
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /opt
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /media
    type: plain
  - fs_type: ext4
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /root
    type: plain
  - fs_type: xfs
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /srv
    type: plain
  - fs_type: swap
    minsize: 1 GiB
    type: plain
  type: ""
